prompt: Create a highly detailed anime-style kirigami paper-cut lantern diorama featuring a young blonde anime girl as the central subject. The lantern is a vertical cylindrical arch-shaped display on a wooden tabletop in a dim cozy study, with blurred bookshelves and warm room decor in the background. Inside the glowing paper lantern, show a bust-up portrait of the girl turned slightly three-quarters toward the viewer, with soft fair skin, large sparkling amber-gold eyes reflecting the lantern light, a small delicate mouth, and pale champagne blonde bob-length hair with layered bangs and loose side strands. Decorate her hair with elaborate paper flowers, small blue blossoms, pearl-like beads, and dangling floral earrings. Dress her in an elegant sleeveless cream blouse with ruffled collar details, a dark high-waisted skirt or corset panel, and a loose dusty-rose jacket slipping off her shoulders. Surround her with intricate cut-paper floral silhouettes and vines, including exactly 1 large crescent moon on the upper left, 1 smaller crescent moon behind the left flowers, 1 glowing star on the upper right, many dangling bead-chain ornaments, and dense layered flowers around both sides and the bottom. The lantern frame should have a rounded top, white lace-like cutout borders, floral arches, thin vertical supports, and perforated paper patterns casting complex leaf-and-flower shadows across the wooden surface. Use warm golden internal illumination, translucent paper texture, delicate layered paper edges, soft depth of field, cinematic cozy lighting, extremely intricate craftsmanship, high detail, romantic fantasy mood, vertical composition, no text, no watermark.
